author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for IDE-opened file context injection plus task_notification system messages around subagent spawn/complete. Per the issue body, blocked on #517 (IDE bridge for editor-push file-opened events) and #507 (coordinator). Neither blocker is implemented. Compact-boundary portion already shipped in 339a872. Closing the residual ticket — when #517 and #507 land, the small context-injection delta can be filed as a new sub-issue at that time.
